parameters.name: X-API-TOKEN
parameters.description: The API token to be used for authentication

parameters.name: X-Requested-With
parameters.description: Used to send the XMLHttpRequest header

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Includes child relationships in the response, format is comma separated. Check each model for the list of associated includes

parameters.name: index
parameters.description:
Replaces the default response index from data to a user specific string

ie.

```html
  ?index=new_index
```

response is wrapped

```json
  {
    'new_index' : [
      .....  
    ]
  }
```

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of records to return for each request, default is 20

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number to return for this request (when performing pagination), default is 1

parameters.name: client_id
parameters.description: Filter documents by client hashed ID. Returns documents attached to invoices, quotes, credits, expenses, payments, tasks, recurring expenses, recurring invoices, projects, or the client directly.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description:
Comma-separated list of document types to filter by. Available types:
- `private` - Documents where is_public is false
- `public` - Documents where is_public is true
- `pdf` - PDF documents
- `image` - Image documents (png, jpeg, jpg, tiff, gif)
- `other` - All other document types

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort results by column and direction, format: `column|direction` (e.g. `name|asc`, `created_at|desc`).

parameters.name: company_documents
parameters.description: When set to 'true', filters to only return company-level documents.
